intro: Ephemerantha pseudoconvexa, also known as the Orchid Ghost Orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
